subtitle.ja: 「カヤックを漕ぐ人」の完成系から始めます。中央にある2本の水平な糸を、両手の親指で取ります
subtitle.en: Begin from the finished form of “The Kayaker.” With both thumbs, pick up from below the two central horizontal strings.

subtitle.ja: 左右の人差し指の輪に、親指を下から入れます
subtitle.en: Insert both thumbs from below into the index loops.

subtitle.ja: 左右の親指にかかる上の1本の糸を残したまま、下の2本の糸だけを外します
subtitle.en: Retain only the upper thumb string and release the two lower strings from both thumbs.

subtitle.ja: 左右の人差し指の糸を外します
subtitle.en: Release the index strings from both hands.

subtitle.ja: 左右の親指の輪に人差し指を下から入れ、親指の輪を人差し指に移します
subtitle.en: Insert both index fingers from below into the thumb loops and transfer the thumb loops to the index fingers.

subtitle.ja: 中央下の三角の輪に左右の親指を手前側から入れ、親指の腹で左右の糸を引き出します
subtitle.en: Insert both thumbs from the near side into the lower central triangular loop, and with the thumb pads draw out the left and right strings.

subtitle.ja: 左右の人差し指の輪に、親指を下から入れます
subtitle.en: Insert both thumbs from below into the index loops.

subtitle.ja: 左右の親指にかかる上の糸を残したまま、下の糸だけを外します
subtitle.en: Retain the upper strings on both thumbs and release only the lower strings.

subtitle.ja: 左右の人差し指の糸を外します
subtitle.en: Release the index strings from both hands.

subtitle.ja: 左右の親指の輪に人差し指を下から入れ、親指の輪を人差し指に移します
subtitle.en: Insert both index fingers from below into the thumb loops and transfer the thumb loops to the index fingers.

subtitle.ja: 左右の小指の前にある小さな輪に親指を手前側から入れ、親指の背で糸を引き出します
subtitle.en: Insert both thumbs from the near side into the small loops in front of the little fingers, and with the backs of the thumbs draw out the strings.

subtitle.ja: 左右の人差し指の輪に、親指を下から入れます
subtitle.en: Insert both thumbs from below into the index loops.

subtitle.ja: 左右の親指にかかる上の糸を残したまま、下の糸だけを外します
subtitle.en: Retain the upper strings on both thumbs and release only the lower strings.

subtitle.ja: 左右の人差し指の糸を外します
subtitle.en: Release the index strings from both hands.

subtitle.ja: 左右の親指の輪に人差し指を下から入れ、親指の輪を人差し指に移します
subtitle.en: Insert both index fingers from below into the thumb loops and transfer the thumb loops to the index fingers.

subtitle.ja: 中央下の四角形の輪に、左右の親指を手前側から入れます
subtitle.en: Insert both thumbs from the near side into the lower central square loop.

subtitle.ja: 左右の小指の糸を外し、両手を左右に広げて完成です
subtitle.en: Release the little-finger strings from both hands and open the hands to show the finished figure.
